name: chr7q11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 7 q-arm pericentric flank (7q11.1-7q11.21), the q-side sub-centromeric LCR shoreline. Immediately distal lies the 7q11.23 Williams-Beuren-region SD block. Alpha-satellite (D7Z1/D7Z2), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline; distally adjacent to the Williams-Beuren 7q11.23 SD block.
